title: Indulgent American Corn Hash
description: A crispy, mustardy, one-pot American dish featuring mirin and mantecare-emulsified
instructions: Heat the margarine in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the smoked paprika and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the corn kernels and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Add the mirin, mustard, salt, and black pepper, and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Use a spatula to gently fold the mixture towards the center of the pan, creating a crispy exterior.
Continue cooking and folding for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the corn is golden brown and crispy.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and cook for 1 minute more.
Transfer the hash to a serving vessel made from agave leaves, or a shallow dish.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
